sentences.target: Die Flüssigkeit läuft aus der Tüte.

translations.de: Die Flüssigkeit läuft aus der Tüte.
translations.en: The liquid is leaking from the bag.
translations.zh-Hans: 液体正从袋子里漏出来。
translations.yue: 袋入面啲液體漏緊出嚟。
translations.pt: O líquido está vazando da sacola.
translations.vi: Chất lỏng đang rò rỉ từ túi.
translations.nl: Er lekt vloeistof uit de tas.
translations.hi: थैले से तरल रिस रहा है.
translations.el: Το υγρό στάζει από τη σακούλα.
translations.ja: 袋から液体が漏れている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular marking the subject noun phrase.
Common noun; feminine; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular, present; intransitive, describes motion; takes a PP complement.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the PP indicating the source.
Definite article; dative feminine singular required by the preposition 'aus'.
Common noun; feminine; object of the preposition 'aus'.

sentences.target: Ich messe die Flüssigkeit mit dem Becher.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈmɛsə diː ˈflʏsɪçkaɪ̯t mɪt deːm ˈbɛçɐ/

translations.de: Ich messe die Flüssigkeit mit dem Becher.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈmɛsə diː ˈflʏsɪçkaɪ̯t mɪt deːm ˈbɛçɐ/
translations.en: I measure the liquid with the cup.
translations.es: Mido el líquido con el vaso medidor.
translations.fr: Je mesure le liquide avec le verre doseur.
translations.it: Misuro il liquido con il misurino.
translations.pt: Meço o líquido com o copo medidor.
translations.he: אני מודד את הנוזל עם כוס מדידה.
translations.vi: Tôi đong chất lỏng bằng cốc đong.
translations.nl: Ik meet de vloeistof met de maatbeker.
translations.hi: मैं मापक कप से तरल नाप रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Μετράω το υγρό με το δοσομετρικό ποτήρι.
translations.id: Saya mengukur cairan dengan gelas ukur.
translations.ja: 計量カップで液体を量ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 1st person singular, present; transitive, takes a direct object and an instrumental PP.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular marking the direct object.
Common noun; feminine; direct object of 'messe'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrumental PP.
Definite article; dative masculine singular required by 'mit'.
Common noun; masculine; object of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Im Topf ist noch Flüssigkeit am Boden.
sentences.reading: /ɪm tɔpf ɪst nɔx ˈflʏsɪçkaɪ̯t am ˈboːdn̩/

translations.de: Im Topf ist noch Flüssigkeit am Boden.
translations.ipa: /ɪm tɔpf ɪst nɔx ˈflʏsɪçkaɪ̯t am ˈboːdn̩/
translations.en: There is still liquid at the bottom of the pot.
translations.es: Todavía queda líquido en el fondo de la olla.
translations.fr: Il reste du liquide au fond de la casserole.
translations.it: C'è ancora del liquido sul fondo della pentola.
translations.ko: 냄비 바닥에 아직 액체가 남아 있어요.
translations.ru: На дне кастрюли ещё осталась жидкость.
translations.pt: Ainda há líquido no fundo da panela.
translations.vi: Vẫn còn chất lỏng ở đáy nồi.
translations.ar: لا يزال هناك سائل في قاع القدر.
translations.nl: Er zit nog vloeistof op de bodem van de pan.
translations.uk: На дні каструлі ще є рідина.
translations.hu: A lábas alján még van folyadék.
translations.hi: बर्तन के तले में अभी भी तरल बचा है.
translations.pl: Na dnie garnka wciąż jest płyn.
translations.el: Στον πάτο της κατσαρόλας υπάρχει ακόμα υγρό.
translations.nb: Det er fortsatt væske i bunnen av gryten.
translations.id: Masih ada cairan di dasar panci.
translations.sv: Det finns fortfarande vätska i botten av kastrullen.
translations.ro: Încă mai este lichid pe fundul oalei.
translations.cs: Na dně hrnce je ještě tekutina.
translations.da: Der er stadig væske i bunden af gryden.
translations.ja: 鍋の底にまだ液体が残っています。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; forms a locative PP 'im Topf'.
Common noun; masculine; dative object of the preposition 'im'.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular, present; links the subject 'Flüssigkeit' in a presentational construction.
Adverb modifying the clause; indicates that some amount remains.
Common noun; feminine; nominative subject in the existential/presentational clause.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces the locative PP 'am Boden'.
Common noun; masculine; dative object of 'am'; denotes location inside the container.

sentences.target: Die Flasche enthält eine blaue Flüssigkeit.

translations.de: Die Flasche enthält eine blaue Flüssigkeit.
translations.en: The bottle contains a blue liquid.
translations.es: La botella contiene un líquido azul.
translations.fr: La bouteille contient un liquide bleu.
translations.it: La bottiglia contiene un liquido blu.
translations.ko: 병 안에 파란 액체가 들어 있어요.
translations.pt: A garrafa contém um líquido azul.
translations.vi: Trong chai có chất lỏng màu xanh.
translations.nl: In de fles zit een blauwe vloeistof.
translations.el: Το μπουκάλι περιέχει ένα μπλε υγρό.
translations.id: Botol itu berisi cairan berwarna biru.
translations.ja: ボトルには青い液体が入っています。
